docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE,INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE,INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO COSTS; IFP WAIVER GRANTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, ROGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE,INC. $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-11-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE,INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY VALDEZ, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW PIPELINE,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, ROGER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
